extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won Stage 1 Tour Down Under 2020 via MØRKØV Michel leadout, edging PHILIPSEN Jasper after being delivered sub-200m
tactical_patterns: IMPEY Daryl attacked first intermediate sprint at 15km specifically to collect early GC time bonuses before sprinter finale.
Deceuninck-Quick-Step delivered BENNETT Sam under 200m, timing proved critical as PHILIPSEN Jasper's superior acceleration faded before line.
STANNARD Ian and INEOS led final circuit pacing, suggesting GC positioning priority despite flat sprint finish expectation.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Power endurance in final 200m overcame PHILIPSEN's acceleration, immediate payoff for Deceuninck move validates sprint leadout compatibility
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: Better initial acceleration than BENNETT but lacked power sustainability final 100m, positioning advantage not converted
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: Proactively hunted bonus seconds 15km in rather than waiting for finish, rare GC aggression on apparent sprint stage
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: Deployed for PORTE Richie protection rather than own sprint ambitions, confirms domestique role despite rainbow jersey
